title: hieracium jordanii subsp. pseudotomentosum
intro: Hieracium jordanii subsp. pseudotomentosum, also known as the hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The medicinal properties of Hieracium jordanii subsp. pseudotomentosum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and provide relief from respiratory issues. Hieracium jordanii subsp. pseudotomentosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
